textPlain: XMP was the first time I ever picked up a soldering iron -- so I could "hack" my OG Xbox 1.0.I will always, always love and respect it. I love that they are still committed to the OG device. I want to pull mine out and see if the spinning hard drive still works after all these years, might even try to update it!
XBMC on the original Xbox was so unbelievably far ahead of it's time, it's crazy and that's not just nostalgia talking.
Yes! So many streaming sources and high performance/responsiveness.
XBMP is the main reason I got my Xbox, it was fantastic. And later I even played a few games on it!
